history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a partially visible face with large overlaid text reading “biarkan” and “jelahh” along with a smiling face emoji.

Main Subject:
The main focus appears to be a close, cropped view of a person’s face, with the eyes and upper facial features visible but much of the image obscured by the text overlay.

Setting:
The background is unclear due to heavy cropping and blur, with indoor or outdoor context not distinguishable; the overall lighting appears soft and warm.

Visual Details:
The image is blurry and tightly framed, showing a person with dark eyebrows and an eye area near the top of the frame. Over the face, there is bold, white, lowercase text: “biarkan” on the upper line and “jelahh” on the lower line, followed by a yellow circular smiling face emoji with closed eyes. A dark curved shape overlays part of the person’s face near the bottom, and a white triangular play icon appears at the left side.

Visible Text:
biarkan
jelahh 😋

Practical Summary:
The image is a blurry, close-up view of a person’s face with large white text and a yellow smiling face emoji overlaid. A white play icon is visible on the left side of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
